modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks Spanish as their first language.
You should write the description in bullet points and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Difficulty accessing settings in Google Docs

full_description_text:
- El usuario está intentando acceder a la configuración en Google Docs.  
- No sabe cómo encontrar la opción para ver sus ajustes.  
- Esto está causando confusión y frustración al no poder personalizar su experiencia.  
- El usuario necesita ayuda para entender cómo acceder a estas configuraciones.
